paths.default_game_path: C:\Program Files (x86)\Grinding Gear Games\Path of Exile 2

commands.phase_1_extract: npm run extract:game -- --game-path="C:\Program Files (x86)\Grinding Gear Games\Path of Exile 2"

runtime_boundaries.node: Orchestrates CLI commands, DB migrations, and app-facing exports.
runtime_boundaries.rust: Owns high-volume file processing, hashing, import, diff, and native parser work.
runtime_boundaries.pob_lua: Acts as upstream reference and adapter until Rust mappers reach parity.
runtime_boundaries.postgres: Stores raw snapshots, normalized entities, relationships, assets, and diffs.
